enable_partial_responses.description: When at least one question is answered, the response is stored (true). The response is stored when all questions are answered (false).

iteration_count.description: For a recurring schedule, this field specifies the number of times the survey should be shown to the user. Use 1 for 'once every X days', higher numbers for multiple repetitions. Works together with iteration_frequency_days to determine the overall survey schedule.

iteration_frequency_days.description: For a recurring schedule, this field specifies the interval in days between each survey instance shown to the user, used alongside iteration_count for precise scheduling.

linked_flag_id.description: The feature flag linked to this survey

anyOf.description: For rating questions: use sentiment keys based on scale thirds - negative (lower third), neutral (middle third), positive (upper third)

responseValues.description: Only include keys for responses that should branch to a specific question or 'end'. Omit keys for responses that should proceed to the next question (default behavior).

display.description: Display format: 'number' shows numeric scale, 'emoji' shows emoji scale

lowerBoundLabel.description: Label for the lowest rating (e.g., 'Very Poor')

scale.description: Rating scale can be one of 3, 5, or 7

anyOf.description: For NPS rating questions: use sentiment keys based on score ranges - detractors (0-6), passives (7-8), promoters (9-10)

responseValues.description: Only include keys for responses that should branch to a specific question or 'end'. Omit keys for responses that should proceed to the next question (default behavior).

display.description: NPS questions always use numeric scale

lowerBoundLabel.description: Label for 0 rating (typically 'Not at all likely')

anyOf.description: For single choice questions: use choice indices as string keys ("0", "1", "2", etc.)

responseValues.description: Only include keys for responses that should branch to a specific question or 'end'. Omit keys for responses that should proceed to the next question (default behavior).

choices.description: Array of choice options. Choice indices (0, 1, 2, etc.) are used for branching logic

hasOpenChoice.description: Whether the last choice (typically 'Other', is an open text input question

shuffleOptions.description: Whether to randomize the order of choices for each respondent

choices.description: Array of choice options. Multiple selections allowed. No branching logic supported.

hasOpenChoice.description: Whether the last choice (typically 'Other', is an open text input question

shuffleOptions.description: Whether to randomize the order of choices for each respondent

responses_limit.description: The maximum number of responses before automatically stopping the survey.

start_date.description: Setting this will launch the survey immediately. Don't add a start_date unless explicitly requested to do so.

targeting_flag_filters.description: Target specific users based on their properties. Example: {groups: [{properties: [{key: 'email', value: ['@company.com'], operator: 'icontains'}], rollout_percentage: 100}]}

aggregation_group_type_index.description: Group type index for group-based feature flags.

groups.description: Release condition groups for the feature flag.

aggregation_group_type_index.description: Group type index for this condition set. None means person-level aggregation.

properties.description: Property conditions for this release condition group.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Operator used to compare the property value.

* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains
* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `gt` - gt
* `gte` - gte
* `lt` - lt
* `lte` - lte

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Comparison value for the property filter. Supports strings, numbers, booleans, and arrays.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Optional value. Runtime behavior determines whether this is ignored.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Date comparison operator.

* `is_date_exact` - is_date_exact
* `is_date_after` - is_date_after
* `is_date_before` - is_date_before

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Date value in ISO format or relative date expression.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Semantic version comparison operator.

* `semver_gt` - semver_gt
* `semver_gte` - semver_gte
* `semver_lt` - semver_lt
* `semver_lte` - semver_lte
* `semver_eq` - semver_eq
* `semver_neq` - semver_neq
* `semver_tilde` - semver_tilde
* `semver_caret` - semver_caret
* `semver_wildcard` - semver_wildcard

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: List of strings to evaluate against.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Membership operator for cohort properties.

* `in` - in
* `not_in` - not_in

type.description:
Cohort property type required for in/not_in operators.

* `cohort` - cohort

value.description: Cohort comparison value (single or list, depending on usage).

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Operator for feature flag dependency evaluation.

* `flag_evaluates_to` - flag_evaluates_to

type.description:
Flag property type required for flag dependency checks.

* `flag` - flag

value.description: Value to compare flag evaluation against.

rollout_percentage.description: Rollout percentage for this release condition group.

variant.description: Variant key override for multivariate flags.

variants.description: Variant definitions for multivariate feature flags.

payloads.description: Optional payload values keyed by variant key.

super_groups.description: Additional super condition groups used by experiments.
